heading: Persons entitled to passport
label: 212 Persons entitled to passport
text: No passport shall be granted or issued to or verified for any other persons than those owing allegiance, whether citizens or not, to the United States.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 4076 derived from , .act May 30, 1866, ch. 10214 Stat. 54
Amendments1902—Act , substituted “those owing allegiance, whether citizens or not, to the United States” for “citizens of the United States”.June 14, 1902
